title: Rename 'Latest News' to 'Today News' and reorder Roster above News section

requirements.summary: Change the News section heading from 'Latest News' to 'Today News' in NewsSection.tsx
acceptanceCriteria: The News section heading displays 'Today News' instead of 'Latest News' or any previous label.
No other text or layout in the News section is affected.

file_operations.description: Update the section heading text from 'Latest News' (or its current label) to 'Today News'. Locate the heading element (likely an h2 or h3) that displays the section title and change its text content to 'Today News'. Preserve all other text, styling, layout, and functionality in the component.

requirements.summary: Reorder sections in LandingPage.tsx so RosterSection appears above NewsSection
acceptanceCriteria: On the landing page, the 'Meet With LEGEND' roster section appears visually above the 'Today News' section.
All other sections (Hero, About, Footer) remain in their current positions.
No content or styling is removed from either section.

file_operations.description: Reorder the section components so that RosterSection is rendered before NewsSection in the component tree. The current order is Hero → About → Roster → News → Footer; maintain Hero and About at the top, then place RosterSection, then NewsSection, then Footer. Simply swap the positions of the <RosterSection /> and <NewsSection /> components in the JSX return statement. Do not modify any section content, props, or styling.
